instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall arbitrate between automatic and manual shift requests.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall prioritize manual shift request over automatic shift logic.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prioritize safety shift requests.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall override other shift requests when protection shift request occurs.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall handle kickdown shift requests.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall prioritize kickdown over normal automatic upshift.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall reject conflicting shift requests.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect conflict when multiple shift requests occur simultaneously.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall verify gear validity before executing shift request.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall validate target gear before shift execution.

L4_requirements: IF Target_Gear IN Valid_Gear_List THEN Allow_Shift
IF Target_Gear NOT_IN Valid_Gear_List THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Target_Gear IN Valid_Gear_List THEN Monitor_Shift_Process

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent arbitration during active shift.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject new shift requests when shift operation is active.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall handle shift request timeout.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall cancel shift request if execution exceeds time limit.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain safe gear during arbitration fault.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall maintain predefined gear when arbitration logic fails.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall track shift request priority.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall assign priority level to each shift request.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall clear arbitration state after shift completion.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reset shift arbitration logic when shift process completes.
